title: SPC Signal Delay Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the financial impact of delayed detection and response to out-of-control signals in statistical process control (SPC) systems, incorporating lean and six sigma principles.

inputs.label: Process Cycle Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Average time to complete one production cycle. Used to estimate units produced per shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to complete one production cycle. Used to estimate units produced per shift.

inputs.label: Units per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

inputs.label: Defect Rate When Out of Control
inputs.businessContext: Expected defect percentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

label_i18n.en: Defect Rate When Out of Control

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected defect percentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

inputs.label: Defect Rate When In Control
inputs.businessContext: Baseline defect percentage when the process is stable and in control.

businessContext_i18n.en: Baseline defect percentage when the process is stable and in control.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred per defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

inputs.label: Detection Delay (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

inputs.label: Response Delay (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

inputs.label: Shift Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of production hours per shift. Used to calculate daily production volume.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of production hours per shift. Used to calculate daily production volume.

rules.message: Out-of-control defect rate must be greater than in-control defect rate.
Detection and response delays cannot be negative.
Hidden loss multiplier must be at least 1.0 when hidden losses are included.

thresholds.message: Delay cost per event exceeds $10,000. Immediate process improvement recommended.
Out-of-control defect rate exceeds 10%. Review process capability and control limits.
Low signal frequency may indicate insufficient sampling or insensitive control limits.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
